summary: iter298 frontend-only E2E: (1) SuperAdmin Biometric Health tab renders BiometricHealthCard with all 7 counters (bio-total/active/offline-devices, bio-pending/processing/completed/failed-jobs). Refresh button works. (2) TabsList has grid-cols-6 with tabs: active(العملاء), demo(التجريبية), subscriptions(الاشتراكات), all(الكل), biometric(صحّة البصمة), security(السجل الأمني) — all 6 present. (3) System Settings dialog → notifications-prefs-tab shows all 6 switches with correct defaults (shift_close whatsapp/email/bell=ON, integrity_check whatsapp=OFF, email=OFF, bell=ON). Toggling integrity_check_email fires PUT /api/system/notification-preferences (200 OK), and value persists after full page reload. (4) HR → BiometricDevices tab → 'إضافة جهاز' dialog opens with device-port-input, device-type-select (5 opts: fingerprint/face/palm/rfid/hybrid). advanced-zk-options-toggle expands details revealing device-model-select, device-protocol-select (3 opts: zk-standard/zk-push/pull-sdk), device-comm-password, device-timeout-input, device-force-udp — all visible. iFace880 present in model list.
action_items: Minor spec/impl deviation: task said 30 ZK models but BiometricDevices.js line 718 array has 31 models (7 K + 3 F + 1 TX + 4 MB + 4 iFace + 3 G + 2 SpeedFace/ProFaceX + 4 SF + 3 UA). Not a bug — just update task doc or model list.

HR Biometric tab is 12th tab and requires scroll_into_view/mouse click (force click on role=tab in RTL layout was flaky). Consider a fixed tabs container or making the tab reachable via keyboard/data-testid. Non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: SuperAdmin.js is 6964 lines — should be split into smaller modules (NotificationPrefsPanel, BiometricHealthCard already sub-components but the dashboard component is huge).

Preview logs show repeated 'Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED' — likely local ZK agent (http://localhost) connection attempts from BiometricDevices agent-status check. Expected in preview but generates noisy console errors — consider suppressing when navigator.onLine indicates preview/no-agent env.
test_credentials: SuperAdmin: owner@maestroegp.com/owner123 (secret 271018), 2FA not triggered in preview. Tenant Admin: admin@maestroegp.com/admin123.
seed_data_creation: None. Notification preference was toggled and reverted at end of test (integrity_check_email back to OFF).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 pre-release UI tasks verified end-to-end. Only outstanding cosmetic note is 31 vs 30 ZK model count. HR biometric tab was reached via mouse click on the last tab (12th) rather than role=tab query — a race between splash/skeleton and Radix Tabs mounting. Adding data-testid=hr-biometric-tab to the TabsTrigger would help future automation.
